navTip.overview: What Ovo is seeing, thinking, and has queued right now
navTip.outputs: What Ovo did and will do for you: reminders / calendar / notes / drafts
navTip.knowledge: Ovo's world model of you (entities + relations + profile)
navTip.process: What Ovo has done + the full causal chain of each inference
navTip.settings: Trust levels / privacy / AI backend / appearance

settingsPanel.title: Settings
settingsPanel.subtitle: Start with what matters: privacy first, then appearance, then developer tools
settingsPanel.devShowAdvancedHint: Reveals “Reasoning”, “Ovo's action log” and “Ovo's self-reflection” — for advanced users debugging Ovo.
settingsPanel.aiIntervalHint: How long after seeing the screen to ask the AI to analyze
settingsPanel.healthHint: Periodically verify screenshot / OCR / AI backend are working
settingsPanel.backendHint: Hermes runs via a local command (fully offline, recommended); Direct API uses the cloud (screen summaries go to the cloud LLM).
settingsPanel.backendSwitchConfirm:
Switch to “{{label}}”?

This takes effect on Ovo's next thought.
settingsPanel.backendLabelApi: Direct API (cloud call - screen summaries sent to the LLM vendor)
settingsPanel.ttsWarn: When enabled, suggestion text is sent to the Microsoft Edge TTS online service (including OCR excerpts). Keep off if handling sensitive content.
settingsPanel.toastHint: How much the corner suggestion cards pop up. The console always shows everything; this only controls pop-up alerts.
settingsPanel.toastHintSilent: Never pops; all suggestions go to the console
settingsPanel.toastHintAlerts: Only risk alerts and actions needing confirmation pop
settingsPanel.toastHintAll: All suggestions pop to the screen corner
settingsPanel.quickPausedMsg: Observing paused for 30 min — resume anytime in the Privacy section below

toast.closeCountdown: auto-closes in {{n}}s, click to close now
toast.contentCodeHidden: (content has code, hidden — check the original on screen)
toast.ttsDisabled: Read-aloud is off — enable it in Settings → Voice output
toast.ttsNetwork: Network issue, can't reach Edge TTS service
toast.ttsFirstPlay: First playback needs a click anywhere in the window to authorize
toast.ttsEnablePrompt: Read-aloud is off by default. When enabled, the text to read is sent to the Microsoft Edge TTS online service (including OCR excerpts). Enable and read now?

process.replaySubtitle: The full reasoning chain of every time Ovo looked at the screen, thought, and acted. Tap any to see details.
process.emptyHint: Use Ovo for a while; every inference is logged here

memory.title: Memory
memory.tipTimeline: What Ovo logged over time — what I did / what others said
memory.tipProfile: Ovo's understanding of you — roles / topics / projects
memory.clearConfirm: Clear the entire knowledge graph (entities/relations/events/pipeline)? This cannot be undone.
memory.understandingHint: Tap any item to tell Ovo if it's right — it gets more accurate over time
memory.unknownYouHint: Tell it your role / current project / interests so it gets more accurate
memory.stillLearning: Ovo is still learning — give it a bit more time and it'll understand you better.
memory.graphNoData: No graph data yet, let ovo observe for a while
memory.renameTitle: Rename to the correct name (old name still matches)
memory.renamePrompt: Rename this memory to the correct name:
memory.forgetTitle: Delete this memory and stop Ovo from recording it
memory.forgetConfirm:
"Delete & never record" will:
① Delete "{{name}}" and its {{n}} relations
② Add a rule: never record/mention it again

Proceed?
memory.forgetOk: Deleted "{{name}}" and added a rule — it won't be recorded again.
memory.forgetPartial: Deleted "{{name}}", but writing the rule failed. Add it manually under Settings → Rules you've taught Ovo.

overview.draftsSubtitle: No evidence to auto-run → waiting for your OK

setupChecklist.title: Startup check
setupChecklist.subtitle: Check item by item whether Ovo can work. Blocked items tell you why and what to do next.
setupChecklist.screenDetail: How Ovo sees your screen to understand context
setupChecklist.screenWhy: Without it Ovo can't see any screen content and can't work. Enable Ovo under System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording.
setupChecklist.captureDetail: Capture the screen and extract its text
setupChecklist.captureWhyScreen: Grant screen recording permission first, then capture/OCR can start.
setupChecklist.captureWhy: Self-check failed: {{err}}. Make sure there's a visible app window on screen.
setupChecklist.windowWhy: Can't detect the active window right now — switch to any app window and it'll recover.
setupChecklist.backendDetail: The brain that turns screen content into understanding and suggestions
setupChecklist.backendWhy: No AI backend detected. hermes is the default (no API key needed); or configure an API key under Settings → AI backend, then click re-detect.
setupChecklist.automationDetail: On demand: the first time Ovo writes a reminder or sends mail, macOS will prompt for permission

firstWin.title: Get your first suggestion
firstWin.subtitle: Ovo watches what you're doing. Try one of these and you'll see its first suggestion within seconds.
firstWin.emailTitle: Open an email you need to reply to
firstWin.emailDesc: Ovo will draft a reply for you
firstWin.selected: Got it — once you open "{{title}}" I'll watch this scenario and surface a suggestion when it's ready.
firstWin.waitTitle: Waited a few minutes with no suggestion?
firstWin.waitNoCapture: Ovo hasn't captured any screen yet: make sure the Startup check above all passes, and that there's a visible app window.
firstWin.waitObserving: Ovo is watching but hasn't hit a moment it can help with. Try opening one of the scenarios below to give it clear context.

negativePatterns.title: Rules you've taught Ovo
negativePatterns.hint: The don'ts you set via "never do this / mute this app / irrelevant" on suggestions. They constrain future suggestions. Revocable anytime.
negativePatterns.empty: You haven't taught Ovo any don'ts yet
negativePatterns.emptyHint: Pick a reason via "not interested" on a suggestion card and the rule shows up here

suggestionCard.reasonPrompt: What's wrong? Tell Ovo and it'll learn
suggestionCard.ruleNever: User explicitly asked: never push suggestions like "{{title}}" ({{label}}) again
suggestionCard.ruleMuteApp: User asked: don't push "{{label}}" reminders in {{app}}
suggestionCard.ruleIrrelevant: User says "{{label}}" suggestions are often irrelevant — don't push without strong on-screen evidence

metricsCard.title: How Ovo's doing
metricsCard.hint: Real numbers as it learns you (all local, never uploaded)
metricsCard.notYet: Not enough data yet - use Ovo for a bit
